center.name: 拉利伯塔德大区
center.summary: 拉利伯塔德大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Tawny-throated dotterel、闪羽蜂鸟、Maranon tyrannulet等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: neglecta is the northernmost; it is found in the northwestern Peruvian departments of La Libertad and Ancash

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the central and western ranges of the Colombian Andes and south along both Andean slopes through Ecuador into Peru on the eastern slope to La Libertad Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Peru from La Libertad and San Martín departments south to Cuzco and northern Puno departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in parts of four departments: southern Amazonas, southeastern Cajamarca, eastern La Libertad and northern Ancash

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Maranon tyrannulet is listed by some sources as found only in the Marañón River valley in northern Peru's Amazonas, Cajamarca, and La Libertad departments. Other sources also include southern Ecuador's Loja Province. It inhabits arid scrublands and woodlands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in Peru from La Libertad and Ancash departments south to the departments of Huancavelica and Ayacucho

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: pallidus of the tawny-throated dotterel has a limited range; it is found in coastal northern Peru only as far south as the Department of La Libertad

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Tumbes tyrant is primarily found in northwestern Peru from Tumbes Department south to La Libertad Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of shining sunbeam is found in all three Andean ranges of Colombia and south from there through Ecuador to Peru's departments of La Libertad and Huánuco
